# server-cache-tls

server cmd-params: basehref, cache expirations, TLS min/max/ciphers, dex connection

!!! tip "Direction: `roundtrip`"

| | |
| --- | --- |
| Direction | `roundtrip` |
| Path | `testdata/cases/cmd-params/server-cache-tls` |

## Input

### `argocd-cmd-params-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cmd-params-cm
data:
  server.basehref: /argo
  server.rootpath: /argo
  server.disable.auth: "false"
  server.enable.gzip: "true"
  server.app.state.cache.expiration: 1h
  server.default.cache.expiration: 24h
  server.glob.cache.size: "1000"
  server.dex.server: https://dex:5556
  server.dex.server.plaintext: "false"
  server.dex.server.strict.tls: "true"
  server.tls.minversion: "1.2"
  server.tls.maxversion: "1.3"
  server.tls.ciphers: TLS_ECDHE_RSA_WITH_AES_128_GCM_SHA256
```

## Expected ArgoCDConfiguration

### `configuration.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
kind: ArgoCDConfiguration
metadata:
  name: argocd-config
  namespace: argocd
spec:
  commitServer: {}
  controller: {}
  repoServer: {}
  server:
    authEnabled: true
    baseHref: /argo
    cache:
      appStateExpiration: 1h0m0s
      defaultExpiration: 24h0m0s
      globCacheSize: 1000
    compression: gzip
    dexConnection:
      address: https://dex:5556
      insecureSkipVerify: false
      tlsEnabled: true
    rootPath: /argo
    tls:
      ciphers:
      - TLS_ECDHE_RSA_WITH_AES_128_GCM_SHA256
      maxVersion: "1.3"
      minVersion: "1.2"
```
